description: Access the OpenAlex academic research catalog — 270M+ publications.
name: io.github.cyanheads/openalex-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: OpenAlex account API key, sent as api_key= - optional (free from https://openalex.org/settings/api). Without it, anonymous rate limits apply.
environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional email sent as mailto= to identify yourself to OpenAlex (the polite pool). Separate from the API key.
environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_MAILTO

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
